examples: I hear him shuffling from the rug onto the linoleum behind me.
We move between ceiling and floor, between striplight and the croak of linoleum.
One large room is hung with jaunty linoleum prints.
The clatter of the shoe on the linoleum when it slipped from his grasp brought more.
There are fewer in-laws in Ms Moore's world, fewer memories, familiar spots, less linoleum.
